questionHtml: Outline the reasons for secretion of sweat in humans.
markschemeHtml:
1. cooling/removal of heat/lowering body temperature;
  2. to prevent overheating
    OR
    to help maintain body temperature/for temperature homeostasis/for thermoregulation
    OR
    to keep temperature at 37 °C;

meta.title: Outline the reasons for secretion of sweat in humans.
breadcrumbLabels: A1.1.2. Hydrogen bonds as a consequence of the polar covalent bonds within water molecules
